calculation_idea: Unique ID from instrument plus bar time plus direction.
NT_implementation_notes: Generate once at ConfirmedSignal; reuse for state updates.
backtest_notes: Needed to join signal and outcome rows.

calculation_idea: Bullish or bearish candidate direction.
NT_implementation_notes: Maintain separate bull and bear candidates before final selection.
backtest_notes: Do not net scores too early.

calculation_idea: Preview, ConfirmedSignal, Triggered, Validated, Invalidated.
NT_implementation_notes: Default export starts at ConfirmedSignal; preview optional.

calculation_idea: Map total score to A+, A, B, C, watch, reject.
NT_implementation_notes: Apply hard caps before assigning grade.

calculation_idea: Sum location, failure, confirmation, risk, timing after caps.
NT_implementation_notes: Calculate separately for bull and bear.
backtest_notes: A+ threshold is research default, not truth.

calculation_idea: 0-25 weighted score for edge quality.
NT_implementation_notes: Include HOD/LOD, swing, user, VWAP, value/POC if available.

calculation_idea: 0-30 score for exhaustion/absorption/failure evidence.
NT_implementation_notes: Aggregate module scores but log components separately.
backtest_notes: Avoid hiding bad modules in aggregate.

calculation_idea: 0-20 for bar close, next-bar trigger, reclaim, quick MFE.
NT_implementation_notes: No intrabar final confirmation by default.

calculation_idea: 0-15 for stop distance, bar size, reward room.
NT_implementation_notes: Compute stop from signal low/high plus buffer.

calculation_idea: 0-10 for session and volatility context.
Nearest edge type: HOD, LOD, swing, VWAP, value, user, none.
Price of rejected edge.
Ticks from signal extreme/close to nearest edge.
True if bar touches HOD/LOD within tolerance.
Rank of current high/low over swing lookback.
bullish_meaning: Low rank near 0 supports long edge.
bearish_meaning: High rank near 1 supports short edge.

calculation_idea: Close/location within recent range 0-1.
NT_implementation_notes: Use rolling range or session range.

calculation_idea: Trend, rotation, transition, unknown.
bullish_meaning: Long reversal better in rotation low or failed breakdown.
bearish_meaning: Short reversal better in rotation high or failed breakout.
NT_implementation_notes: Start simple: VWAP slope plus IB state.

calculation_idea: Minutes before next cash open.
Premarket, open, morning, lunch, afternoon, overnight.
Volume at signal bar low.
bullish_meaning: Low value can mean seller exhaustion.

calculation_idea: Volume at signal bar high.
bearish_meaning: Low value can mean buyer exhaustion.

calculation_idea: True if edge volume <= configured threshold at qualified edge.
backtest_notes: Compare flag vs graded edge volume.

calculation_idea: Score low edge volume, level quality, bar size, prior failure.
Percentile rank of edge volume versus recent edge volumes.
bullish_meaning: Low percentile at low supports long.
bearish_meaning: Low percentile at high supports short.

calculation_idea: Ask volume minus bid volume.
bullish_meaning: Negative at low can be absorbed if price holds.
bearish_meaning: Positive at high can be trap if price fails.
NT_implementation_notes: Use NinjaTrader delta source if available.
backtest_notes: Delta sign alone is not a signal.

calculation_idea: Percentile of current delta over lookback.
bullish_meaning: Extreme negative at low can support absorption after failure.
bearish_meaning: Extreme positive at high can support trap after failure.
NT_implementation_notes: Use separate positive/negative percentiles or z-score.

calculation_idea: Z-score of bar delta over lookback.
NT_implementation_notes: Guard against division by low variance.

calculation_idea: Measures weakening delta into repeated extreme.
Price extreme not confirmed by cumulative delta extreme.
bullish_meaning: Bullish at lower low with higher cum delta.
bearish_meaning: Bearish at higher high with lower cum delta.

calculation_idea: Price progress per unit of delta/effort.
bullish_meaning: Low downside progress despite sell delta supports long.
bearish_meaning: Low upside progress despite buy delta supports short.

calculation_idea: (Close-Low)/(High-Low).
Close rejects extreme beyond configured fraction.
bullish_meaning: Close off low after sell effort.
bearish_meaning: Close off high after buy effort.

calculation_idea: Next bar trades in signal direction by confirmation ticks.
NT_implementation_notes: Avoid lookahead when exporting signal-time rows.
backtest_notes: Compare close-only vs intrabar next bar.

calculation_idea: Bars from ConfirmedSignal to Triggered.
Max favorable excursion one bar after trigger.
Max adverse excursion one bar after trigger.
Max favorable excursion over 3 bars.
MFE over no-response timeout window.
True if MFE below threshold by timeout.
NT_implementation_notes: Emit state update, not initial signal value.

calculation_idea: High of signal bar.
Low of signal bar.
Signal high-low divided by tick size.
Percentile of signal range over lookback.
backtest_notes: Test cap, not hard reject first.

calculation_idea: Reference entry price: close, next-bar trigger, reclaim.
NT_implementation_notes: Do not assume fill quality in indicator.

calculation_idea: Signal low/high plus buffer.
Absolute entry-stop distance in ticks.
Distance to first opposing reference level.
NT_implementation_notes: Target logic not strongly sourced; keep optional.

calculation_idea: Effort-result failure plus close contradiction/repeated defense.
High aggressive effort with low price progress.
Candle result conflicts with delta sign.
bullish_meaning: Green/off-low with negative delta supports long.
bearish_meaning: Red/off-high with positive delta supports short.

calculation_idea: Count repeated failures at same price zone.
Price breaks level then closes back inside.
Max distance beyond broken level.
backtest_notes: Too small may be wick noise.

calculation_idea: Bars spent outside before reclaim.
Close/trade back through failed level.
Temporary level breach with volume/delta spike.
NT_implementation_notes: Do not call all wicks sweeps.

calculation_idea: Aggressive flow percentile at poor location.
NT_implementation_notes: Label as aggression failure, not certain trap.

calculation_idea: Price moves through likely trapped entry zone.
bullish_meaning: Shorts trapped if price rises through zone.
bearish_meaning: Longs trapped if price falls through zone.
NT_implementation_notes: Trap zone approximated from signal bar/body/POC.

calculation_idea: Strength of initial directional push.
bullish_meaning: Strong sell initiative that may fail.
bearish_meaning: Strong buy initiative that may fail.

calculation_idea: Price progress in initiative direction.
bullish_meaning: Low downside follow-through supports long failure.
bearish_meaning: Low upside follow-through supports short failure.

calculation_idea: Dominant buy/sell imbalance direction.
bullish_meaning: Sell imbalance can fail bullish at low.
bearish_meaning: Buy imbalance can fail bearish at high.

calculation_idea: Adjacent imbalance count.
bullish_meaning: Sell stack at low can fail bullish.
bearish_meaning: Buy stack at high can fail bearish.

calculation_idea: Price reclaims/losses failed imbalance zone.
backtest_notes: More important than stack print itself.

calculation_idea: Imbalance direction conflicts with candle result.
bullish_meaning: Sell imbalance inside bullish result supports absorption.
bearish_meaning: Buy imbalance inside bearish result supports absorption.

calculation_idea: Number of tests of same level.
bullish_meaning: Second test can support long if weaker.
bearish_meaning: Second test can support short if weaker.

calculation_idea: Distance from retest extreme to prior level.
Current test delta compared to first test.
bullish_meaning: Weaker selling on retest supports long.
bearish_meaning: Weaker buying on retest supports short.

calculation_idea: Current volume percentile over lookback.
bullish_meaning: High sell volume at low only if fails.
bearish_meaning: High buy volume at high only if fails.

calculation_idea: High volume at edge plus failed continuation.
Reason grade is capped: no data, no level, trend, stop, timing.
Reason signal invalidated: stop, acceptance, no response, opposite flow.
Flags for footprint, delta, cumulative delta, imbalances, POC/value.
backtest_notes: Avoid false confidence in incomplete data.
